name: Viral Content Scraper
tagline: Find the top 1% of viral content ideas before everyone else
description: Real-time scraping across 9 social media platforms with AI-powered virality scoring. Discover what's about to blow up, filter by platform, category, and velocity, and set alerts for specific topics.
features: Multi-platform scraping (Reddit, HN, Twitter, LinkedIn, TikTok, YouTube, Instagram, Threads, Bluesky)
